foundation_model_architecture_pretrainin: This paper proposes or analyzes a new architecture for large language models, foundation models, transformers, attention mechanisms, or neural sequence models.
This paper studies pretraining methods, training objectives, scaling laws, model capacity, or data-compute tradeoffs for foundation models.
This paper introduces improvements to transformer blocks, attention layers, positional encoding, context handling, or model structure.
This paper investigates mixture-of-experts models, sparse activation, modular neural architectures, or efficient scaling of large models.
This paper focuses on how model architecture or pretraining design affects generalization, reasoning, transfer, or downstream performance.
This paper presents a new foundation model or pretraining recipe and evaluates its performance across multiple tasks or benchmarks.
post_training_alignment_reinforcement_le: This paper studies instruction tuning, supervised fine-tuning, preference optimization, RLHF, DPO, or other post-training methods for large language models.
This paper proposes a method to improve model helpfulness, harmlessness, truthfulness, controllability, or instruction-following ability.
This paper uses reinforcement learning, reward models, preference data, or human feedback to optimize language model behavior.
This paper investigates self-improvement, self-training, critique, reflection, revision, or iterative refinement in AI models.
This paper compares different alignment methods or post-training pipelines for chat models and assistant-style foundation models.
This paper analyzes failure modes, tradeoffs, or unintended effects caused by post-training, preference learning, or alignment optimization.
reasoning_planning_agentic_ai: This paper studies reasoning abilities in large language models, including mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, symbolic reasoning, or multi-step inference.
This paper proposes methods for planning, task decomposition, long-horizon decision-making, or structured problem solving with language models.
This paper focuses on autonomous agents, agentic AI systems, tool use, API use, workflow execution, or environment interaction.
This paper investigates multi-agent systems, agent collaboration, agent communication, negotiation, coordination, or role-based AI workflows.
This paper evaluates chain-of-thought, tree-of-thought, self-correction, reflection, or other reasoning-enhancement techniques.
This paper studies how AI agents make decisions, use memory, select actions, recover from errors, or complete complex real-world tasks.
retrieval_memory_knowledge_grounding: This paper studies retrieval-augmented generation, external knowledge grounding, document retrieval, evidence selection, or knowledge base question answering.
This paper proposes methods to reduce hallucination by grounding model outputs in retrieved documents, citations, databases, or verifiable sources.
This paper focuses on long-term memory, working memory, episodic memory, memory compression, or memory-augmented language models.
This paper improves dense retrieval, vector search, reranking, semantic search, hybrid search, or retrieval pipelines for AI systems.
This paper investigates long-context modeling, context compression, context selection, or efficient use of large document collections.
This paper studies factual consistency, source attribution, citation generation, or evidence-aware generation in language models.
multimodal_vision_audio_video_documents: This paper studies multimodal models that combine text with images, video, audio, speech, charts, tables, or visual documents.
This paper focuses on vision-language models, visual question answering, image captioning, image understanding, or image-text reasoning.
This paper investigates video understanding, temporal reasoning, action recognition, video question answering, or multimodal sequence modeling.
This paper studies audio-language models, speech understanding, music generation, sound recognition, or audio-text multimodal learning.
This paper focuses on document understanding, OCR, layout analysis, table understanding, chart interpretation, or visually rich document reasoning.
This paper proposes a multimodal foundation model or evaluates cross-modal reasoning across text, image, video, audio, or structured visual inputs.
embodied_ai_robotics_world_models: This paper studies embodied AI, robotics, robot learning, physical interaction, manipulation, navigation, or control.
This paper proposes vision-language-action models, robot policies, embodied agents, or AI systems that act in physical environments.
This paper investigates world models, environment dynamics, simulation, spatial reasoning, or planning in physical or virtual spaces.
This paper applies imitation learning, reinforcement learning, offline learning, or policy optimization to robotic tasks.
This paper focuses on 3D scene understanding, object manipulation, navigation, motion planning, or autonomous embodied task execution.
This paper evaluates how AI agents perceive, reason, and act in interactive environments such as robots, simulators, games, or real-world spaces.
efficient_training_inference_ai_systems: This paper studies efficient training or inference for large language models, foundation models, transformers, or multimodal models.
This paper focuses on quantization, pruning, distillation, sparsity, compression, LoRA, adapters, or parameter-efficient fine-tuning.
This paper improves model serving, latency, throughput, batching, KV cache management, memory efficiency, or deployment performance.
This paper investigates distributed training, parallelism, GPU utilization, hardware-aware optimization, or scalable AI infrastructure.
This paper proposes small language models, edge AI, on-device inference, low-resource deployment, or resource-constrained model optimization.
This paper analyzes compute cost, memory cost, energy efficiency, inference speed, or practical system tradeoffs in AI model deployment.
evaluation_benchmarks_reliability: This paper proposes or analyzes benchmarks, evaluation datasets, leaderboards, metrics, or testing frameworks for AI models.
This paper evaluates reliability, robustness, factuality, calibration, uncertainty, consistency, or generalization of language models.
This paper studies hallucination detection, factual error measurement, model confidence, or trustworthiness evaluation.
This paper investigates benchmark contamination, data leakage, reproducibility, evaluation bias, or limitations of existing benchmarks.
This paper uses human evaluation, automatic evaluation, judge models, preference evaluation, or metric design to assess model performance.
This paper analyzes model failure modes, adversarial evaluation, out-of-distribution behavior, or stress testing of AI systems.
safety_security_privacy_governance: This paper studies AI safety, model risk, harmful behavior, misuse prevention, responsible AI, or trustworthy AI systems.
This paper investigates jailbreak attacks, prompt injection, adversarial prompting, red teaming, or security vulnerabilities in AI models.
This paper focuses on privacy leakage, memorization, data extraction, membership inference, model inversion, or sensitive information exposure.
This paper analyzes bias, fairness, discrimination, ethics, accountability, transparency, or governance of AI systems.
This paper proposes safeguards, safety filters, monitoring methods, refusal mechanisms, or risk assessment tools for deployed AI systems.
This paper studies regulatory, social, institutional, or policy-related challenges created by artificial intelligence systems.
data_centric_ai_synthetic_data: This paper studies synthetic data generation, data augmentation, self-generated data, or LLM-generated training data.
This paper focuses on dataset curation, data filtering, data selection, data quality, data mixture design, or data-efficient training.
This paper investigates annotation methods, weak supervision, active learning, human labeling, or label-efficient learning for AI systems.
This paper analyzes dataset bias, data contamination, duplicate data, benchmark leakage, or training data quality problems.
This paper proposes methods to use AI models to clean, label, generate, transform, or improve datasets.
This paper studies how training data composition, quality, diversity, or selection strategies affect model performance and behavior.
ai_for_science_medicine_engineering: This paper applies AI to scientific discovery, hypothesis generation, automated research, laboratory workflows, or scientific reasoning.
This paper studies biomedical AI, medical diagnosis, clinical decision support, healthcare foundation models, or patient-related applications.
This paper applies AI to biology, chemistry, drug discovery, protein design, genomics, molecular modeling, or materials science.
This paper focuses on AI for physics, engineering, simulation, computational science, numerical modeling, or scientific computing.
This paper proposes domain-specific foundation models for scientific, medical, engineering, or technical research applications.
This paper evaluates how AI systems can assist experts in scientific analysis, experiment design, technical reasoning, or domain-specific prediction.
business_social_applications_human_ai_wo: This paper studies enterprise AI, business process automation, workplace productivity, decision support, or AI-assisted organizational workflows.
This paper focuses on human-AI collaboration, copilots, assistants, interactive systems, user studies, or human-centered AI applications.
This paper applies AI to education, tutoring, writing, creativity, communication, content generation, or knowledge work.
This paper studies AI applications in finance, economics, law, marketing, customer service, operations, management, or professional services.
This paper investigates real-world AI deployment, adoption, user behavior, productivity impact, social impact, or economic consequences.
This paper analyzes how AI changes workflows, labor, organizations, decision-making, creativity, or human-machine interaction.
